one_time_description: Land claim settlement proceeds received; $1,491,252 paid out to members, net settlement recognized as revenue
economic_notes: Owns 100% of Webster Farms Limited, an agricultural enterprise in Nova Scotia. Also operates Gaming Commission and Commercial Fisheries. AVFN Development Group GP Ltd. and AVFN Forestry Group Limited Partnership are fully consolidated subsidiaries.
notes: Large one-time land claim settlement of $8,028,029 recognized as revenue in 2022; $1,491,252 paid to members as expense. Restricted cash - funds held in trust of $3,068,653 relates to land claim settlement proceeds held for band members. OSR is difficult to isolate precisely as 'Other' revenue of $6,314,723 likely includes both own-source and grant revenues not itemized. Three fully consolidated subsidiaries plus one GBE (Webster Farms Limited via WFL Holdings Limited) on modified equity basis reporting a net loss of $430,263. Restricted cash includes CMHC Replacement Reserve and trust funds held by Federal Government totaling $174,000, plus $3,068,653 land claim trust funds.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
